message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

skinparam package {
  BackgroundColor #F5F5DC
  BorderColor #808000
}

skinparam class {
  BackgroundColor #FFFFCC
  BorderColor #808000
}

package "<<aggregate>> Product" {
  class "Product" as P_Product <<E>>
  class "ShortDescription" as P_ShortDescription <<C>>
  class "LongDescription" as P_LongDescription <<C>>
  class "TechnicalDescription" as P_TechnicalDescription <<C>>
  class "Barcode" as P_Barcode <<C>>
  class "ProductionCode" as P_ProductionCode <<C>>
  class "PriceWithoutVAT" as P_PriceWithoutVAT <<C>>
  class "PriceWithVAT" as P_PriceWithVAT <<C>>
  class "Reference" as P_Reference <<C>>
  class "Weight" as P_Weight <<C>>
  class "Volume" as P_Volume <<C>>
  class "Photo" as P_Photo <<C>>
  class "BrandName" as P_BrandName <<C>>
}

package "<<aggregate>> Category" {
  class "Category" as C_Category <<E>>
  class "AlphanumericCode" as C_AlphanumericCode <<C>>
  class "Description" as C_Description <<C>>
  class "SuperCategory" as C_SuperCategory <<C>>
}

class "<<entity>>\n<<root>>\nProduct" as Product {
  -uniqueInternalCode
}

class "<<value object>>\nLongDescription" as LongDescription
class "<<value object>>\nTechnicalDescription" as TechnicalDescription
class "<<value object>>\nBarcode" as Barcode
class "<<value object>>\nProductionCode" as ProductionCode
class "<<value object>>\nPriceWithoutVAT" as PriceWithoutVAT
class "<<value object>>\nPriceWithVAT" as PriceWithVAT
class "<<value object>>\nReference" as Reference
class "<<value object>>\nWeight" as Weight
class "<<value object>>\nVolume" as Volume
class "<<value object>>\nPhoto" as Photo
class "<<value object>>\nShortDescription" as ShortDescription
class "<<value object>>\nBrandName" as BrandName

class "<<entity>>\n<<root>>\nCategory" as Category

class "<<value object>>\nAlphanumericCode" as AlphanumericCode
class "<<value object>>\nDescription" as Description
class "<<value object>>\nSuperCategory" as SuperCategory

Product "1" -- "1" LongDescription : characterized by
Product "1" -- "1" TechnicalDescription : characterized by
Product "1" -- "1" Barcode : characterized by
Product "1" -- "0..1" ProductionCode : identified by
Product "1" -- "1" PriceWithoutVAT : associated
Product "1" -- "1" PriceWithVAT : associated
Product "1" -- "1" Reference : identified by
Product "1" -- "1" Weight : characterized by
Product "1" -- "1" Volume : characterized by
Product "1" -- "1" Photo : characterized by
Product -- ShortDescription : characterized by
Product -- BrandName : made by

BrandName -- Category : organized by

Category "1" -- "1" AlphanumericCode : identified by
Category "1" -- "1" Description : characterized by
Category "1" -- "0..1" SuperCategory : belongs to

@enduml
```
